hero.subtitle: Empower your community with enterprise-grade security, automated family records, and seamless administrative controls in one unified platform.

features.title: Built for Trust, Designed for Scale
features.subtitle: Every feature in MahallasPlus is crafted to handle complex community hierarchies with absolute precision.
features.f1_desc: Manage Main and Sub Mahallas with dedicated admin roles and jurisdiction-locked data access.
features.f2_desc: Manual ID verification ensures only legitimate community leaders can operate on the platform.
features.f3_desc: Sensitive member data is encrypted at rest and protected by strict role-based access controls.
features.f4_desc: Full lifecycle management of family records, member relationships, and demographic trends.
features.f5_desc: Unique system-wide identity tracking to prevent duplicate registrations and ensure data integrity.
features.f6_desc: Highly available infrastructure powered by Vercel and Neon, accessible from any device.

pricing.title: Choose the Perfect Plan for Your Mahalla
